description: Configure the kinematic limits and control parameters of a 3-axis camera gimbal in the Webots drone payload (`DEF GIMBAL_PAYLOAD Robot`) to resolve oscillation and self-collision issues. For the Pan Motor (`name "pan_motor"`), set the minPosition to -3.14, maxPosition to 3.14, and controlPID to 50.0 0.1 5.0. For the Tilt Motor (`name "tilt_motor"`), set the minPosition to -1.57, maxPosition to 0.52, and controlPID to 40.0 0.1 3.0. For the Roll Motor (`name "roll_motor"`), set the minPosition to -0.78, maxPosition to 0.78, and controlPID to 60.0 0.2 4.0. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/stabilized_gimbal.wbt.
